revenue_per_minute_usd.description: Estimated revenue loss or risk per minute

regulatory_exposure.description: Regulated markets or compliance reporting exposure

sla_risk.description: Risk of breaching operational SLA/SLO targets

alert_frequency.description: Repeated alerts in a short window increase confidence

P1.description: Customer-facing outage, severe revenue risk, or regulated-market exposure

P2.description: Major degradation or limited customer-facing impact

P3.description: Partial degradation with workaround or no major customer impact

P4.description: Operational noise, capacity warning, or no customer impact

examples.rationale: 100% error rate, high revenue risk, regulated market
delayed processing with no current outage
